description:
Grip tight the reins tempered by the light of dawn.
What's scorched never fades beneath the skin —
Until they step onto the promised golden chariot once more.

—Agent Record.

Welcome to Roscaelifer. I'm Velina, head of the External Strategy Department. I'll be your guide.
Velina Airgid

"So these Bangboo are refusing their routine annual inspection again..."
"Don't worry, I'll handle it accordingly."
"After all, it's about time we threw another tea party."

—Agent Record
